ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2025 Continued To Jun-10-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion Of Motion To File A Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to the hearing Mr. Torres appeared late after the case was already called. He was informed to read the tentaive ruling.

No appearances in Open Court.The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JESUS TORRES' Motion To File A Second Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff Jose Torres' motion to file a second amended complaint is granted. Although Mr. Torres did not file a proof of service, no defendant has appeared in the case and he has not yet filed any proof of service of a complaint or summons on any defendant. Consequently, as far as any defendant is concerned, the second amended complaint is likely the first complaint that it will see and will suffer no prejudice from the granting of permission to Mr. Torees to file the second amended complaint.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and must drop a hard copy of the proposed order in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-11-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
